name: reverse_in_place
mojo_unit:
def reverse_in_place(mut v: List[Float64]):
    var i = 0
    var j = len(v) - 1
    while i < j:
        var tmp = v[i]
        v[i] = v[j]
        v[j] = tmp
        i += 1
        j -= 1

name: IntQueue
mojo_unit:
struct IntQueue(Copyable, Movable):
    var data: List[Int]
    var head: Int

    def __init__(out self):
        self.data = List[Int]()
        self.head = 0

    def enqueue(mut self, x: Int):
        self.data.append(x)

    def dequeue(mut self) -> Int:
        var v = self.data[self.head]
        self.head = self.head + 1
        return v

    def count(self) -> Int:
        return len(self.data) - self.head
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var q = IntQueue()
    q.enqueue(1)
    q.enqueue(2)
    q.enqueue(3)
    print(q.dequeue())
    print(q.count())
    print(q.dequeue())
    print(q.count())

@fieldwise_init
struct Circle(Copyable, Movable):
    var cx: Float64
    var cy: Float64
    var radius: Float64

def circle_area(c: Circle) -> Float64:
    return 3.141592653589793 * c.radius * c.radius

def point_inside(c: Circle, px: Float64, py: Float64) -> Bool:
    var dx = px - c.cx
    var dy = py - c.cy
    return dx*dx + dy*dy <= c.radius*c.radius

name: armstrong_check
mojo_unit:
def armstrong_check(n: Int) -> Bool:
    var x = n
    var digits = 0
    while x > 0:
        digits += 1
        x = x // 10
    x = n
    var s = 0
    while x > 0:
        var d = x % 10
        var p = 1
        for _i in range(digits):
            p *= d
        s += p
        x = x // 10
    return s == n
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(1 if armstrong_check(153) else 0)
    print(1 if armstrong_check(370) else 0)
    print(1 if armstrong_check(100) else 0)
    print(1 if armstrong_check(9474) else 0)

def normalize_angle(a: Float64) -> Float64:

cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%s\n", rot13("Hello").c_str()); printf("%s\n", rot13("Uryyb").c_str()); return 0; }

name: is_anagram
cpp_unit: int is_anagram(std::string a, std::string b){ int ca[26]; for(int i=0;i<26;i++) ca[i]=0; for(int i=0;i<(int)a.size();i++){ int c=(unsigned char)a[i]; if(c>=65&&c<=90) c+=32; if(c>=97&&c<=122) ca[c-97]++; } for(int i=0;i<(int)b.size();i++){ int c=(unsigned char)b[i]; if(c>=65&&c<=90) c+=32; if(c>=97&&c<=122) ca[c-97]--; } for(int i=0;i<26;i++) if(ca[i]!=0) return 0; return 1; }

cpp_unit: int longest_run_char(std::string s){ int n=(int)s.size(); if(n==0) return 0; int best=1, cur=1; for(int i=1;i<n;i++){ if(s[i]==s[i-1]){ cur++; if(cur>best) best=cur; } else cur=1; } return best; }

name: levenshtein
cpp_unit: int levenshtein(std::string a, std::string b){ int n=(int)a.size(); int m=(int)b.size(); std::vector<int> prev(m+1), cur(m+1); for(int j=0;j<=m;j++) prev[j]=j; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){ cur[0]=i; for(int j=1;j<=m;j++){ int cost=(a[i-1]==b[j-1])?0:1; int d=prev[j]+1; int ins=cur[j-1]+1; int sub=prev[j-1]+cost; int mn=d; if(ins<mn) mn=ins; if(sub<mn) mn=sub; cur[j]=mn; } for(int j=0;j<=m;j++) prev[j]=cur[j]; } return prev[m]; }
cpp_driver:

name: count_differing_bits
cpp_unit: long count_differing(uint64_t a, uint64_t b){ uint64_t x=a^b; long c=0; while(x!=0ULL){ c+=(long)(x&1ULL); x>>=1; } return c; }
mojo_unit:
def count_differing(a: UInt64, b: UInt64) -> Int:
    var x = a ^ b
    var c = 0
    while x != 0:
        c += Int(x & 1)
        x >>= 1
    return c

mojo_unit:
def run_length_count(n: Int) -> Int:
    var m = n
    var runs = 0
    var prev = -1
    while m > 0:
        var d = m % 10
        if d != prev:
            runs += 1
            prev = d
        m //= 10
    return runs

from std.math import trunc

def wrap_to_range(x: Float64, lo: Float64, hi: Float64) -> Float64:
    var range = hi - lo
    var r = x - lo - trunc((x - lo) / range) * range
    if r < 0.0:
        r += range
    return lo + r

name: Vector3D
Clock24
mojo_unit:
struct Clock24(Copyable, Movable):
    var hours: Int
    var minutes: Int

    def __init__(out self, h: Int, m: Int):
        self.hours = h
        self.minutes = m

    def tick(mut self, mins: Int):
        var total = self.hours * 60 + self.minutes + mins
        total = ((total % 1440) + 1440) % 1440
        self.hours = total // 60
        self.minutes = total % 60

    def asMinutes(self) -> Int:
        return self.hours * 60 + self.minutes
mojo_driver:

name: CircularCounter
mojo_unit:
struct CircularCounter(Copyable, Movable):
    var value: Int
    var limit: Int
    var wraps: Int

    def __init__(out self, lim: Int):
        self.value = 0
        self.limit = lim
        self.wraps = 0

    def increment(mut self):
        self.value = self.value + 1
        if self.value >= self.limit:
            self.value = 0
            self.wraps = self.wraps + 1

    def current(self) -> Int:
        return self.value

    def cycles(self) -> Int:

name: Vec4
mojo_unit:
@fieldwise_init
struct Vec4(Copyable, Movable):
    var a: Float64
    var b: Float64
    var c: Float64
    var d: Float64

    def add(mut self, o: Vec4):
        self.a += o.a
        self.b += o.b
        self.c += o.c
        self.d += o.d

    def scale(mut self, s: Float64):
        self.a *= s
        self.b *= s
        self.c *= s
        self.d *= s

    def dot(self, o: Vec4) -> Float64:
        return self.a * o.a + self.b * o.b + self.c * o.c + self.d * o.d

    def sum(self) -> Float64:
        return self.a + self.b + self.c + self.d
